description_long: This helicopter features a compact, rounded fuselage with a prominent main rotor mounted on top, supported by a central mast. The main rotor is circular and appears to have multiple blades, with a dark color and a solid, robust structure. The tail section is short and ends with a circular detail, possibly a tail rotor or decorative element, and a long, thin boom extends from the rear. The landing gear consists of two short, sturdy skids with small footpads, providing stable ground support. The exterior is primarily black with some white and gray accents, and the overall design is stylized, with simplified geometric forms and minimal surface detailing.
description: A compact, stylized black helicopter with a circular main rotor, short tail boom, and sturdy landing skids. The design is simple, with minimal surface details and a rounded fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular main rotor above the rounded fuselage, with both landing skids and the front of the helicopter visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, thin tail boom extending from the rear and the circular detail at the end, with one landing skid and the rotor assembly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail boom, circular rear detail, and the layered structure of the fuselage, with both skids visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the tail boom and rear detail from a different angle, with the main rotor and one landing skid visible.
attribute_rotor_blades: The main rotor consists of several long, flat blades arranged in a circular pattern, appearing black with no visible markings. The blades are wide and robust, likely made of metal or composite material.
attribute_landing_skids: The landing skids are short, tubular, and black, with small footpads at the ends. They are connected by crossbars for added stability.
